productName: Armosphera A1 Localization AM VAT return engine
guardrails: Keep VAT return computations pure, dependency-free, and offline; do not add network, filesystem, or environment reads.
Do not change official source metadata or line numbers without updating primary-source citations and focused tests.
Keep computeVatReturn and vatReturnForm reconciled for payable, recoverable, and empty periods.
Keep validateVatReturnForm fail-closed: malformed forms return structured errors and never throw.
Keep whole-dram integer validation and rate-sanity guards in place for official VAT-return line edits.
